title: Gambling Surveillance Officers and Gambling Investigators
description: Observe gambling operation for irregular activities such as cheating or theft by either employees or patrons. Investigate potential threats to gambling assets such as money, chips, and gambling equipment. Act as oversight and security agent for management and customers.

tasks.text: Monitor establishment activities to ensure adherence to all state gaming regulations and company policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe casino or casino hotel operations for irregular activities, such as cheating or theft by employees or patrons, using audio and video equipment and one-way mirrors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report all violations and suspicious behaviors to supervisors, verbally or in writing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain log of surveillance observations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect and monitor audio or video surveillance equipment to ensure it is working appropriately.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Act as oversight or security agents for management or customers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
